preserveUserBrands: assets/brands/* except assets/brands/example/ (example is updatable, user brands are not)
notes: v1.1.1: Upgraded the bundled runtime for macOS 26 compatibility, fixing a startup crash on Apple Silicon Macs.
whatsNew: Fixed startup crash on macOS 26.x Apple Silicon
Upgraded the bundled Chromium runtime for performance and security
Added a defensive entitlement for modern macOS JIT enforcement
